description: Letter from Shelomo [b. Yosef] ha-Kohen Gaon (r. 1025 CE) to Efrayim b. Shemarya, Fustat. Dating: 1025 CE (per Gil), but this estimate is based solely on the Gaon's potential scribal hand. For other documents with this scribal attribution, compare with: ENA 4101.17b (PGPID 796), ENA 2804.8 (PGPID 686), ENA 4020.42 (PGPID 781).
description_he: מכתב משלמה [ב' יוסף] הכהן גאון (שלט 1025 לספירה) לאפרים ב' שמריה, פוסטאט. מתוארך 1025 לספירה.
